programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: Daria struggles with Jane's unexpected desire to be on the school track team.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: Tensions between Jane and Daria come to a head when Daria realizes that her feelings for Tom might be more complex than she'd ever expected.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: When the Morgendorffers move to Lawndale, bubbly younger daughter Quinn becomes instantly popular while her sarcastic sister Daria is told to work on her self-esteem.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: In an attempt to make some cash, Beavis & Butt-head stake out a parking lot, sit in shopping carts and try to get hit by cars.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Beavis can't take Butt-head's verbal abuse anymore, and snaps while they're checking out the site of a local murder.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-Head find themselves trapped in their favorite elevator with a smokin' hot chick, but when it comes to scoring, these guys aren't going anywhere.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-Head become ace bounty hunters after a chance meeting with a reality TV star in a hardware store. Will these vigilantes land a real fugitive?

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head win a radio contest and become disc jockeys for a day.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Beavis & Butt-head explore the career possibilities in selling blood.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Beavis & Butt-head explore the career possibilities in selling blood.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: While causing mischief at a drive-in movie theatre, Beavis & Butt-head experience a new phase of the moon.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Suffering from nasty colds, Beavis & Butt-head visit a doctor in hopes of glomming a prescription remedy.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Beavis & Butt-head's school assignment is to write a poem in the venerated Haiku format.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Beavis & Butt-head pay off a debt to society by doing community service work in a hospital.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: A suggestive commercial convinces Beavis & Butt-head it's time to try frozen yogurt.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Beavis & Butt-head spend Friday night at the local convenience store.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Beavis & Butt-head in their own mini-disaster movie with new friends Lolita and Tanqueray.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Beavis & Butt-head attempt to make some money washing cars.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Beavis & Butt-head decide that kidnapping Stewart would be a quick way to some cash.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: To teach them that crime doesn't pay, Beavis & Butt-head's principal sends them to prison for a day. Bad idea.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Beavis & Butt-head find out jockstraps don't come in size XS.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Beavis & Butt-head and President Clinton explore chaos theory together.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: To better understand their female classmates, Beavis & Butt-head must get in touch with their feelings. Huh huh, he said "touch."

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Beavis & Butt-head unknowingly star in their favorite crime reenactment shows.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Beavis & Butt-head want to hang with a "really cool' bunch of delinquents.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Beavis & Butt-head spend some time with the school's gifted class. Not much time.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Innocent, naive yougsters Beavis & Butt-head are drawn into an insidious religious cult.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Beavis & Butt-head get to express their innermost feeling in a special art exhibit.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Beavis & Butt-head have heard really cool things happen if you tip over a cow...like...uh...it falls over.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Beavis becomes rabid.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.sub-title: They're Coming to Take Me Away, Huh Huh (aka Psychiatrist)
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head pass all their Rorscach tests.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head inadvertently stop a suicide.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head try to start their own phone service.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head learn CPR from Mr. Buzzcut.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Beavis & Butt-head join the late night talk show wars.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head help Mr. Anderson build an in-ground swimming pool.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: "Beavis and Butt-head get stranded on their own island, while in search of cool chicks, like Ginger.BALL BREAKERS: Just how DO you crack open a bowling ball?"

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head get to look at real nudes.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: The return of Lolita and Tanqueray! Beavis and Butt-head go on their first date, well, almost.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Mr. Van Driessen gives his class a lesson in manners that no one will ever forget. He punches out the etiquette teacher.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Butt-head gets stuck in a construction site pipe, a la Baby Jessica.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head join Captain Dick Jackman on his Sunday morning program, "rapping" about their problems.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head get a lesson in politeness, after they volunteer to work the Highland High crisis phone line.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.sub-title: Beavis and Butt-head vs. the Vending Machine
programme.desc: The vending machine wins.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head win a radio contest and become disc jockeys for a day.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: During a sugar rush, Beavis' alter ego appears. He reeks havoc at Highland High looking for "teepee for his bunghole."

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head's worst fears are realized when they have to kill two hours, until something good comes on TV.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: A piece of chicken lodges in Butt-head's throat. Beavis inadvertently saves the day.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Images of Beavis and Butt-head grace the walls of a photo gallery after they find a lost camera and put it to creative use.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: On a quest to see morning wood at the zoo, Beavis and Butt-head discover (to their dismay) that humans are the only animals that walk erect.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head become security guards at the mall. Thank God it's only for one day.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: The pain builds as Beavis and Butt-head spend the day in line for a porta potty outside the "Creatures of Rock" concert.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head try to strike it rich in their backyard, just like Jed Clampett. But this oil sure has a strong sewage-like smell.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Beavis and his bacteria ridden "thingy" contaminate the food at Burger World.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head help a pair of movers locate the cool stuff at Stewart's house. But were they really movers?

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head adopt a vicious dog at a shelter and it trains them.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head sell chocalate bars for their school. Well, the chocolate bars practically sell themselves.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head witness a plane crash and appear in a cheesy reenactment on "Rescue 911."

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head crash a wedding in hopes of making out with the bride.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head find a dead animal and try to sell its fur. But Beavis soon becomes attached to the lifeless creature.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: After being instructed to change the oil in the fryer at Burger World, Beavis and Butt-head get the oil from a local gas station.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: As the rest of the school evacuates, Beavis and Butt-head try to locate a bomb in the school kitchen.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: In an attempt to collect some big insurance money, Butt-head tries to give Beavis a whiplash injury while riding the school bus.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Beavis can't take Butt-head's verbal abuse anymore, and snaps while they're checking out the site of a local murder.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head sue Kimberly for sexual harassment, since she's giving them wood.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: On the bus ride to their canyon-hike field trip, Mr. Van Dreissen grabs his guitar and breaks into song, only to be horribly injured yet again.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head spend their cash making single-sided, black-and- white photocopies of money, in a lame attempt at counterfeiting.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.sub-title: Bungholio: Lord of The Harvest (aka Halloween Special)
programme.desc: An evening of trick-or-treating takes a strange turn when Beavis becomes the Great Cornholio.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head try to stay awake all night, in an attempt to discover the secret behind morning wood.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: For his oral report on an historical figure, Beavis recounts the valuable lessons he learned one night while eating at Burger World with Butt-head.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Mrs. Stevenson shows up at Butt-head's house, desperate to enlist their help in finding Stewart.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Tom Anderson get Beavis and Butt-head to watch his yard sale, and the boys manage to sell everything when they take the sale inside.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: A substitute teacher tries unconventional methods to reach Beavis and Butt-head.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Tom Anderson sends Beavis and Butt-head to the store to pick up a few items. They don't do a very good job.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head get drunk off non-alcoholic beer and fail a sobriety test.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head have some difficulty mastering the prank of ringing a doorbell and running.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Just For Girls
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head are allowed to watch a film for girls about teen pregnancy. The titillation ends abruptly during the birthing sequence.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head come to the aid of a wounded baby bird...almost.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head show up at an AA meeting hoping to score some booze.
